description: DFK Mainnet Subnets - Avalanche Subnet Monitoring Dashboard for dfk

panels.title: Percentage of Successful Queries by Region
Percentage of Successful Queries by Region and Component

targets.expr:
avg by (component)
((avg by (pod)
(rate(container_cpu_user_seconds_total{namespace="subnet-dfk-mainnet"}[5m])) )
/(avg by (pod)
(avg_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="subnet-dfk-mainnet",resource="cpu"}[5m])) )
* on(pod) group_left(component) kube_pod_annotations{})

# DDQL: (avg:container.memory.rss{subnet:dfk} by {component} / avg:container.memory.limit{subnet:dfk} by {component}) * 100
avg by (component)(
  avg by (pod) (
      avg_over_time(container_memory_rss{}[5m])
    )
/
  avg by (pod) (
    (
      avg_over_time(kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory"}[5m])
    )
  )
* on(pod) group_left(component) kube_pod_annotations{subnet="dfk"})

# DDQL: avg:container.cpu.usage{subnet:dfk} by {component}
avg by (component)
(avg by (pod)
(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{}[5m]))
* on(pod) group_left(component) kube_pod_annotations{subnet="dfk"})

# DDQL: max:container.cpu.throttled{subnet:dfk} by {component}
#container_cpu_cfs_throttled_seconds_total
avg by (component)
(avg by (pod)
(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{}[5m]))
* on(pod) group_left(component) kube_pod_annotations{subnet="dfk"})

panels.title: Rate of Deferred Messaged Handling due to Excessive CPU usage by Peer

targets.expr:
# DDQL: diff(sum:avalanchego.avalanche_mDV3QWRXfwgKUWb9sggkv4vQxAQR4y2CyKrt5pLZ5SzQ7EHBv_vm_eth_chain_block_gas_used_processed{chain:q2aTwKuyzgs8pynF7UXBZCU7DejbZbZ6EUyHr3JQzYgwNPUPi,network:mainnet,is_subnet:true,availability-zone:.*,kube_cluster_name:.*,component:.*,environment:.*,host:.*,pod_name:.*,region:.*,service:subnets,version:.*} by {pod_name})
sum by (pod) (
  rate(
    avalanche_mDV3QWRXfwgKUWb9sggkv4vQxAQR4y2CyKrt5pLZ5SzQ7EHBv_vm_eth_chain_block_gas_used_processed{
      availability_zone=~".*",
      chain=~"q2aTwKuyzgs8pynF7UXBZCU7DejbZbZ6EUyHr3JQzYgwNPUPi",
      component=~".*",
      environment=~".*",
      instance=~"(?i)(.*)",
      is_subnet=~"true",
      k8s_cluster_name=~"(?i)(.*)",
      network=~"mainnet",
      pod=~".*",
      region=~".*",
      service=~"subnets",
      version=~".*"
    }[5m]
  )
)
